bird.name: 白兀鷲
bird.summary: 白兀鷲（學名：Neophron percnopterus），又名埃及禿鷲，是一種稀少的禿鷲。它們分佈在歐洲西南部及非洲北部至南亞。它們的翼底呈黑白色，尾巴呈楔狀。它們有時會用石頭敲破鳥蛋，是少數懂得使用工具的鳥類之一。在溫帶繁殖的群落會向南遷徙過冬，而在熱帶的多是留鳥。它們的數…

locations.name: 西班牙地理
locations.summary: 西班牙面積504,750平方公里（當中陸地面積499,542平方公里，水面面積5,240平方公里），居歐洲第五位，本土最北端到最南端大約830千米，東西方向長1000千米。絕大部份領土位於伊比利亞半島，東北隔比利牛斯山脈與法國和安道爾相連…

relations.subject: 白兀鷲
relations.evidence: In Spain and Morocco, summer roosts are formed mainly by immature birds

relations.subject: 白兀鷲
relations.evidence: Populations of this species declined in the 20th century and some island populations are endangered by hunting, accidental poisoning, and collision with power lines
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

relations.subject: 白兀鷲
relations.evidence: Nearly all breeding failures were due to human activities. In Spain, which holds about 50% of the European population suggested causes of decline include poisoning by accumulation of lead, pesticides (especially due to large-scale use in the control of Schistocerca gregaria locust swarms), and electrocution.{{sfn|Donázar et al
relations.object_summary: 农业化学品通过水体和食物链影响鸟类生存。
